headline:
Smarter predictions
from day one
body:
We can read your cycle history from Apple Health to predict your next period more accurately — right away.

We never write to or share your health data.
privacy: Read-only · Never shared · Change anytime in Settings

education.headline:
Better predictions
start with your data
education.body: Easel can read your past cycle data from Apple Health to give you accurate predictions from day one.
education.bullet1: We only read menstrual cycle data
education.bullet2: Your data stays on your device
education.bullet3: You can disconnect anytime in Settings
education.privacyBadge: Read-only · Private · Your data, your choice

emptyState.headline: No cycle data found
emptyState.body: We couldn't find any period records in Apple Health. No worries — you can enter your cycle info manually.

manualInput.headline: Tell us about your cycle
manualInput.lastPeriodLabel: When did your last period start?
manualInput.cycleLengthHelper: Days from the start of one period to the start of the next
manualInput.periodLengthHelper: How many days your period usually lasts
manualInput.notSureToggle: I'm not sure about my cycle
manualInput.notSureExplanation: No worries! We'll use typical averages (28-day cycle, 5-day period) and improve predictions as you log more data.

validation.dateRequired: Please select when your last period started
validation.dateFuture: The date can't be in the future
validation.dateTooOld: Please select a date within the last 90 days

review.headline: Your cycle summary
review.confidenceMediumDesc: Based on {{count}} cycles — accuracy improves with more data
review.confidenceLowDesc: Based on limited data — predictions improve as you log more periods
review.predictionExplanation: Your prediction is based on your average cycle length of {{cycleLength}} days. We calculate when your next period is likely to start based on when your last one began. The more data we have, the more accurate your predictions become.

permissionDenied.headline: No problem!
permissionDenied.body: You can still get great predictions by entering your cycle info manually. You can always connect Apple Health later in Settings.

tooltips.cycleLength: Your cycle length is the number of days from the first day of one period to the first day of the next. Most cycles are 21-35 days.
tooltips.periodLength: Your period length is how many days you typically bleed. Most periods last 3-7 days.
tooltips.howPredictionWorks: Easel predicts your next period based on your cycle history. With more data, predictions become more accurate. We use your average cycle length to estimate when your next period will start.
tooltips.whatIsConfidence: Confidence shows how reliable the prediction is. More cycle data means higher confidence. High confidence predictions are typically accurate within 1-2 days.
